'''''Sullute''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The cruiser was one of several Rebel warships that met in the [[Delfii system/Legends|Delfii system]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The cruiser's cargo was warheads.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]]
